title: Comic Mask
description: Comic Mask a Mod about iconic masks now inside your Minecraft!
body:
# COMIC MASK!

## Features? 
A new way of dressing to impress your friends or not scare your colleague who stole your diamonds from the secret chest...
They may not be the strongest masks in the world and they may even be weak, but you'll always look stylish in every battle or encounter

## Items?
This mod has so far added 3 masks that you're sure to have seen somewhere before!
Maybe a forced smile followed by a laugh!
Maybe a cold silence and a hidden frown
Or even a big face of fear awaits you...

you can also make the main item for the creation of all masks: Fragment Mask

![FragmentMask](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/997723c952850131fe29d2bab4f349134908cd5c.png)

Using Armadillo Scute and Dye white!

![GenericMask](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ec10d0306acc38fc0cc91fcc85aadaa16259c9e.png)

And then using 8 Fragment Mask and 1 String you can make the Generic Mask and with that the start of making all the masks in the mod.

![Mask's](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a69a4d37bc0fe5536ceacffd006574423be535e3.png)

## FAQ

### Will it replace the armor slot?
Yes, but an alternative if you want to use your armor and mask is to download mods that allow you to do so, such as: CosmeticArmor's...

### Add to Modpacks?
I'd be delighted if you're interested, so no problem.

### Will more types of masks be added?
Yes, it will gradually be updated to add more variety for you!

### Will the masks have effects?
Not at the moment... but I'm planning to make it possible in the future.

Any questions, feel free to share bugs or opinions!
[Report bugs or give your opinion](https://github.com/JammyMDR/Comic-Mask/issues)
